status: Fixed in Team overlap diagnostics lane
finding: A scope-aware Team git-owner gate correctly blocks commits that overlap an active run's `file.write` lease, but its aggregated failure previously omitted the overlapping staged files. That made a valid Coordinator requirement look like unrelated stale-run residue.
expectedBehavior: When Team ownership blocks a commit, ATM should show the exact staged files that overlap active `file.write` leases so the operator can distinguish a real scoped handoff from unrelated run residue.
evidenceOrRepro: Reproduced on 2026-07-11 while committing the 091/092 repair: `packages/cli/src/commands/next.ts` and `scripts/validate-prompt-scoped-next.ts` overlap the active `TASK-AAO-0043` lease. Fixed by returning `relevantFiles` and adding them to `ATM_TEAM_GIT_OWNER_REQUIRED` details. `node --strip-types scripts/validate-team-agents.ts --case hook-team-gate` asserts the exact overlap.
followUp: Keep the overlap list in the pre-commit envelope and preserve both related-scope block and unrelated-scope allow regressions.
